jobs.title: SPOTTER / STRUCTURAL COSTS
jobs.salary_range: TES:in mukaisen palkkauksen-palkkausjärjestelmämme on kannustava, joskus jopa suure
jobs.meta_description: SPOTTER / STRUCTURAL COSTS at Amiko Helsinki Oy. Explore this opportunity in Finland.
jobs.description: We are looking for spotters and building aid workers to work on a data center site in Vihti, covering 19 hectares. Ensure smooth and safe operations.
what_we_expect: Understanding safe working distances and movements of heavy machinery
Existing occupational safety card or readiness to perform it before work begins
Good cooperation skills and responsible attitude
job_responsibilities: * Control and control of heavy machinery and vehicles in the site area.
* Ensure occupational safety, for example, by warning workers and drivers about obstacles, people working in the vicinity or other potential risks.
* General safety and smooth traffic management in the site area.
who_is_this_for: Construction workers with construction site experience
jobs.search_keywords: SPOTTER / STRUCTURAL COSTS Amiko Helsinki Oy Finland other

jobs.title: Traffic Controllers for Construction Sites in Pirkanmaa, Tampere and Surrounding Areas
jobs.company: Ramudden Oy Ab, Liikenteenohjaus Ja Tienpäällystys
jobs.meta_description: Traffic Controllers for Construction Sites in Pirkanmaa, Tampere and Surrounding Areas at Ramudden Oy Ab, Liikenteenohjaus Ja Tienpäällystys. Explore this...
jobs.description: We are looking for traffic controllers on several sites in Pirkanmaa! Ensure safe passage through construction sites as part of a team. Full-time position with asphalt wages.
what_we_expect: Normal senses: vision, hearing and ability to react
At least an AM121 or B driving licence
job_responsibilities: Ensure safe passage and progress of traffic through the site as long as the site is in place. Traffic control usually works in pairs and takes turns controlling traffic.
what_we_offer: A safe and professional work community
Variable sites and working days (seasonal work)
who_is_this_for: Traffic controllers with full age, normal senses, at least an AM121 or B driving licence
jobs.search_keywords: traffic controller Pirkanmaa Tampere construction site
